title: Confirm final trading details
body: The site now uses the public phone, email and Bristol address currently associated with Sharon Louise Kitchen. Confirm the final trading presentation before launch.

title: Upload more real-world imagery
body: The two source images are already loaded into the image library. Add extra vehicle, event or branding photos when available.

title: Confirm exact business trading name
body: The site is seeded as Sharon Kitchen Travel so the structure is usable immediately. Update the final name in Website Content if needed.
